custom_fields.description: Validate that the previous day’s POS is closed before opening a new one.
custom_fields.label: Require Daily POS Closing
custom_fields.name: POS Profile-custom_daily_pos_close

custom_fields.description: Enable discount feature in URY POS
custom_fields.label: Enable Discount
custom_fields.name: POS Profile-custom_enable_discount

custom_fields.description: Set a limit for the cashier to view a restricted number of recently paid invoices.
custom_fields.label: Show Limited Paid Invoices
custom_fields.name: POS Profile-paid_limit

custom_fields.label: Allow Cashier To Edit And Remove Table Order Items
custom_fields.name: POS Profile-remove_items

custom_fields.description: Users assigned this role will function as cashiers in URY POS, responsible for managing billing transactions.
custom_fields.label: Role Allowed For Billing
custom_fields.name: POS Profile-role_allowed_for_billing

custom_fields.description: Users with this role have restricted access to table order functions.
custom_fields.label: Role Restricted For Table Order
custom_fields.name: POS Profile-role_restricted_for_table_order

custom_fields.label: Show Item Image In URY Pos
custom_fields.name: POS Profile-show_image

custom_fields.description: This role grants permissions for Captain Transfer with access to all tables
custom_fields.label: Role Permitted For Captain Transfer
custom_fields.name: POS Profile-transfer_role_permissions

custom_fields.description: Enables Cashiers to view all statuses (Paid, Consolidated, Return Invoices) in the recent order.
custom_fields.label: Allow Cashier To View All Status
custom_fields.name: POS Profile-view_all_status
